title: bumelia celastrina var. angustifolia
intro: Bumelia celastrina var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved bumelia, is a plant species that belongs to the Bumelia genus, native to parts of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and can be used to treat conditions like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Bumelia celastrina var. angustifolia often include decoctions of its bark and leaves, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
